why: Protocol 775 Configuration keep_alive runtime reaction must be proven through Stevenarella's actual reader-loop path. The official inbound and outbound expected frames are already generated in oracle/answers/775/configuration_keepalive_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl and oracle/answers/775/configuration_keepalive_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
what: The root-owned oracle probe cannot currently execute Server::spawn_reader in Configuration state because spawn_reader is private and Server::connect sets Conn state to Play before connect0/spawn_reader. The existing passing protocol echo probe only covers Conn::read_packet -> Packet::map -> packet::send_keep_alive, not the server reader-loop branch.
stop_condition: Provide a narrow, reset-proof-testable reader-loop surface or factorization in stevenarella/src/server/mod.rs that lets the oracle feed a Conn in State::Configuration with the official clientbound keep_alive frame and observe packet::send_keep_alive through the same branch used by Server::spawn_reader, without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts or claiming Configuration completion/Play entry.
